personal.name: Nima Nikoonazar
personal.title: Senior Software Engineer
personal.subtitle: .NET | Python | Microservices | Distributed Systems | Kafka | Kubernetes | System Design | LLM Infrastructure

about: Senior backend engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and operating large-scale distributed systems. Specialized in microservices architecture, event-driven systems, and high-throughput platforms. Strong experience in .NET, Kafka, Kubernetes, Redis, and observability tools. Contributed to major open-source projects including OpenTelemetry and Redis ecosystem, with focus on performance optimization and scalability.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer - Platform Team
experience.description: Owned and maintained identity & user management, geospatial platform services, large-scale Kubernetes systems, Kafka/Flink streaming pipelines, platform infrastructure (GitOps, API gateway, Nginx), LLM-based agent infrastructure, and reusable internal platform services, with a strong focus on development and maintenance across production systems and engineering tooling.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Optimized core back-office systems resulting in 70% reduction in database load. Designed API Gateway using Ocelot for scalable routing. Built distributed job scheduling infrastructure with Quartz.NET and monitoring dashboard. Implemented payment and wallet systems for installment processing. Designed load-balanced order assignment system using weighted round-robin. Improved automation pipelines for insurance reconciliation using Python.

experience.title: Member of Dontnet Foundation
experience.description: Contributed to various open-source projects, focusing on software engineering best practices and community engagement.

experience.title: .NET Developer
experience.description: Designed and implemented ticketing core system using microservices architecture with RabbitMQ and Redis. Built high-scale notification service handling 10K+ events. Developed admin back-office system using Clean Architecture principles. Designed AWS S3-based file management system integrated with CDN. Built background job processing system with Quartz.NET. Improved financial systems integration with external regulatory requirements.

experience.title: Backend Developer
experience.description: Designed product and pricing management system for enterprise CRM. Achieved 90%+ test coverage using xUnit and Moq. Built scalable backend using .NET 6, CQRS, MediatR, and Docker. Implemented integration and persistence testing strategies for large-scale backend systems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering - Computer Software Engineering
education.institution: Behbahan Khatam Al-Anbia University of Technology
